message:
feat(session): implement Identity Map pattern (bd-2pkb)

Add identity_map.rs module that provides true identity map semantics
using Arc<RwLock<>> for shared object references:

- IdentityMap: Ensures same PK returns same object reference
- WeakIdentityMap: Variant using Weak refs for auto-cleanup
- ModelRef/ModelReadGuard/ModelWriteGuard type aliases
- Full support for composite primary keys
- Comprehensive test coverage

This unblocks:
- bd-264: Session.merge() for detached objects
- bd-31l: Session.get() for primary key lookup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
